WorkerAgent.name: receive_leadership_attention
WorkerAgent.description: WorkerAgent receives attention from LeaderAgent, which influences their emotional state and productivity.

required_variables.name: leadership_attention_level
required_variables.description: Level of leadership attention received by WorkerAgent.

required_variables.name: feedback_content
required_variables.description: Content of the feedback provided by LeaderAgent.

output_updates.name: emotional_state
output_updates.description: Updated emotional state of WorkerAgent after receiving leadership attention.

WorkerAgent.name: adjust_productivity
WorkerAgent.description: WorkerAgent adjusts their productivity based on received leadership attention and team support.

required_variables.name: leadership_attention_level
required_variables.description: Current level of leadership attention influencing WorkerAgent.

required_variables.name: support_type
required_variables.description: Type of support provided by TeamAgent.

LeaderAgent.name: provide_feedback_and_tasks
LeaderAgent.description: LeaderAgent provides feedback and assigns tasks to WorkerAgent to enhance their productivity.

required_variables.name: worker_id
required_variables.description: Identifier for the WorkerAgent receiving feedback.

required_variables.name: task_assigned
required_variables.description: Task assigned to WorkerAgent along with feedback.

output_updates.name: feedback_log
output_updates.description: Log of feedback provided to WorkerAgent.

LeaderAgent.name: evaluate_employee_response
LeaderAgent.description: LeaderAgent evaluates the response of WorkerAgent to the feedback and tasks provided.

required_variables.name: response_message
required_variables.description: Message sent by WorkerAgent in response to leadership attention.

output_updates.name: evaluation_outcome
output_updates.description: Outcome of the evaluation performed by LeaderAgent.

TeamAgent.name: initiate_team_interaction
TeamAgent.description: TeamAgent initiates interaction among team members to provide emotional support and enhance productivity.

required_variables.name: interaction_details
required_variables.description: Details of interaction initiated by TeamAgent.

output_updates.name: team_atmosphere
output_updates.description: Updated atmosphere within the team after interaction.
